allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''next'\\'' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch '\\''Get-CimInstance'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, @{N='\\''Cmd'\\'';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(80,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-List')
